name: Baked Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Slice the garlic into thin strips and combine with thyme, red pepper flakes, and olive oil in a baking pan.
3. Add the black olives and toss gently. Bake until the olives are plump, approximately 40 minutes. Allow them to cool before refrigerating.
4. Bring the olives to room temperature and carefully lift them out of the oil for serving.
Notes: The leftover oil can be used to dress pasta or vegetables. Serving size: Approximately 272 calories and 30g fat per 1/4 cup.
